zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Talbot於大約1353年出生在英國賀福爾古德里奇古德里奇 卡素時，她的父親Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbot23歲，母親Pernel Butler22歲。她於大約1377年與Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1401年1月10日在英國林可爾史爾享年49歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Talbot于大约1353年出生在英国賀福爾古德里奇古德里奇 卡素时，她的父亲Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbot23岁，母亲Pernel Butler22岁。她于大约1377年与Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1401年1月10日在英国林可爾史爾享年49岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Talbot was born about 1353, in Goodrich Castle, Goodrich, Herefordshire, England, her father, Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbot, was 23 and her mother, Pernel Butler, was 22. She married Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton about 1377. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 10 January 1401, in Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 49, and was buried in Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Talbot est née environ 1353, à Goodrich Castle, Goodrich, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbot, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Pernel Butler, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton environ 1377. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 10 janvier 1401, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Talbot um 1353 in Goodrich Castle, Goodrich, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbot 23 und ihre Mutter Pernel Butler 22. Sie hat um 1377 Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 10. Januar 1401 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Talbot è nata il circa 1353 nel Goodrich Castle, Goodrich, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbot, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Pernel Butler, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton circa 1377. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 10 gennaio 1401, nel Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolta a Lincolnshire, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Talbot(이)가 대략 1353년 영국 허퍼드실르 구드리치 구드리치 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbot(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Pernel Butler(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1377년 Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1401년 1월 10일 영국 링코실르에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Talbot nasceu aproximadamente 1353, em Goodrich Castle, Goodrich, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbot, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Pernel Butler, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton aproximadamente 1377. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 10 de janeiro de 1401, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 49 anos, e foi sepultada em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Roales, Roales de Campos, Valladolid, Ca: роеилесь, роеилесь де кампос, валладолид, кастилла и леoн, Испания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Talbot родилась около 1353 г. в местности гудрич кастл, гудрич, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbot было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Pernel Butler, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton около 1377 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 10 января 1401 г. в местности линколншир, Англия в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности линколншир, Англия.

Se casó con Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton aproximadamente 1377. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 10 de enero de 1401, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultada en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
